name: Section 338 Asset Acquisition Election

eligibility.description: Requires a 'qualified stock purchase' where 80% of a target's stock is acquired by a corporation within a 12-month period.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows a corporation that makes a qualified stock purchase of a target to treat the transaction as an asset purchase, resulting in a basis step-up for the target's assets to fair market value.
